title: The Comfortable Confidential Cow,
content:
The Comfortable Confidential Cow,
    who sate in her Red Morocco Arm Chair and
    toasted her own Bread at the parlour Fire.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "The Comfortable Confidential Cow,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
